sentences.arabic: الْقُرْآنُ الْكَرِيمُ أَثَّرَ كَثِيرًا فِي اللُّغَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Časni Kur'an je mnogo utjecao na arapski jezik.
sentences.translationEn: The Holy Quran has greatly influenced the Arabic language.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ مَصْدَرٌ لِلْبَلَاغَةِ وَالْفَصَاحَةِ لِكُلِّ كَاتِبٍ.
sentences.translation: On je izvor rječitosti i elokvencije za svakog pisca.
sentences.translationEn: It is a source of eloquence and fluency for every writer.

sentences.arabic: نَجِدُ فِيهِ كَلِمَاتٍ دَقِيقَةً وَمَعَانِيَ عَمِيقَةً جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: U njemu nalazimo precizne riječi i veoma duboka značenja.
sentences.translationEn: We find in it precise words and very deep meanings.

sentences.arabic: يَدْرُسُ اللُّغَوِيُّونَ هَذَا النَّصَّ لِفَهْمِ قَوَاعِدِ النَّحْوِ.
sentences.translation: Lingvisti proučavaju ovaj tekst kako bi razumjeli pravila gramatike.
sentences.translationEn: Linguists study this text to understand the rules of grammar.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، ظَلَّتِ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ قَوِيَّةً عَبْرَ الْعُصُورِ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga je arapski jezik ostao snažan kroz vijekove.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, Arabic has remained strong throughout the ages.
